summary: In Part 2 of this insightful conversation with Vijai Mantri, we go deep into the practical side of long-term investing: ✅ Asset Allocation myths and realities ✅ Goal-based investing with term plans ✅ SIP discipline and compounding math ✅ When to exit a mutual fund ✅ How to avoid IPO/FOMO traps ✅ Emotional mistakes with ESOPs

chapters.label: Recap of Part 1 & What’s in Part 2
Retirement Planning: Why Equity is Non-Negotiable
SIP + Term Plan Combo for Goal-Based Investing
Increase Your Equity Exposure Through SIP
Building a Portfolio For your Goals
IPOs, NFOs & the Danger of FOMO
When to Exit a Mutual Fund ?
What to Consider While Buying a Mutual Fund ?
Flexi Cap vs Multi Asset vs Sector Funds ( What Mutual Funds to Consider?)
ESOP Psychology & How to Exit Strategically

tool.label: Become a Crorepati
tool.reason: Turn the idea into a number. See the two roads to your first crore, and which one is faster for you.

disclaimer: The views expressed in this podcast are personal and meant for informational purposes only. This does not constitute financial advice. Please consult a certified financial advisor before making any investment decisions.
